items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.original_summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 发布 Deployment Simulation 框架，可在模型正式上线前用真实对话数据模拟部署行为，提前发现安全问题。研究性质，没有面向开发者的 API。
items.backend_focus: 无直接影响。如果你的服务对接的是已发布模型，这个研究不改变接口或行为。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.original_summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 推出 Partner Network 计划，注资 1.5 亿美元帮企业落地 AI。本质是渠道生态和商务合作，和后端架构、API 没有任何关系。
items.backend_focus: 对后端零影响。如果企业已经在用 OpenAI，无需改变任何调用方式。

items.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
items.original_summary: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI Academy 新增三门课程，主题是用 AI 提升工作效率。这只是培训内容更新，不涉及模型、API 或 SDK 变化。
items.backend_focus: 对后端零影响。不是技术更新,纯培训内容。

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.original_summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
items.chinese_summary: Preply 语言学习平台接入 OpenAI 生成课程摘要和个性化反馈。是一个客户案例，没有发布任何新接口或新能力。
items.backend_focus: 对后端零影响。如果你想复现类似功能,直接调 OpenAI API 即可,没有专属工具。

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.original_summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
items.chinese_summary: BBVA 银行把 ChatGPT Enterprise 推广到 10 万员工,纯企业级落地案例。没有新 API、没有新功能、和你正在跑的 OpenAI 集成无关。
items.backend_focus: 对后端零影响。可以忽略。

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.original_summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 签署欧盟 AI 内容透明度行为准则,推动 AI 生成内容的溯源标准。这是政策合规层面的动作,不涉及 API 或模型行为变更。
items.backend_focus: 短期对后端零影响。如果未来欧盟强制要求内容标识,可能需要接入 C2PA 元数据。当前无需动作。

items.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
items.original_summary: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.
items.chinese_summary: 天文学家 Chi-kwan Chan 用 Codex 辅助黑洞模拟。典型的应用案例,展示 Codex 能力边界,没有新模型也没有新 API 发布。
items.backend_focus: 对后端零影响。Codex 能力展示,不是产品更新。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
items.original_summary: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 宣布收购 Ona,后者将为 Codex 增加持久化云开发环境,支持长任务运行的 AI agent。收购尚未完成,产品形态和 API 边界都不清晰。
items.backend_focus: 暂时无需行动。等 Ona 能力集成进 Codex 平台后再评估是否需要迁移现有 agent 工作流。

items.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
items.original_summary: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 模型和 Codex 现已在 Oracle Cloud 上架,企业可消耗已有的 OCI 承诺额度来调用。这是商业渠道拓展,接口和价格策略和原平台保持一致。
items.backend_focus: 如果你的公司有未用完的 Oracle Cloud 承诺,可以评估是否把 OpenAI 调用迁移到 OCI 上抵扣额度。

items.title: PRC-linked influence operations are targeting AI debates in the US
items.original_summary: A new report from OpenAI details PRC-linked influence operations using AI to target U.S. tech debates, data center narratives, tariffs, and false claims about ChatGPT.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 发布报告称有 PRC 关联的影响力行动利用 AI 操纵美国科技政策讨论。安全研究层面的披露,和应用层 API 完全无关。
items.backend_focus: 对后端零影响。不是技术更新,只是威胁情报披露。
